strengths: Strong Excel and advanced spreadsheet skills
Proven dashboard and reporting automation (Power BI, Tableau)
Quantified impact on KPIs and efficiency
weaknesses: No explicit HRIS platform experience listed

improvement_bullets: Analyzed operational personnel data, including headcount and turnover rates, at Shine Masters to identify process bottlenecks and optimize team efficiency by 25%.
Partnered with leadership to deliver compensation and performance reporting packages, ensuring high data integrity and accuracy across all organizational metrics.
Managed sensitive client and internal records while documenting SOPs, ensuring strict adherence to data confidentiality and governance standards.
Evaluated employee engagement and operational metrics using Excel and Power BI, translating raw data into actionable insights for executive stakeholders.
Streamlined HRIS-adjacent workflows by automating data intake and reporting pipelines, reducing manual processing time by 40% and improving overall data reliability.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Human Resources Data Analyst opportunity with The Plastic Surgery Center. I am interested in this opportunity because of your commitment to combining medical excellence with a 5-star patient experience, and I am eager to apply my analytical background to support your growing team. What interests me about working for The Plastic Surgery Center is your vision to revolutionize the industry through continuous medical advancement and a culture of employee growth, which deeply resonates with my professional values. I believe my expertise in data visualization and my passion for process automation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data problems by identifying inefficiencies and building automated solutions. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I led an operational overhaul where I replaced manual reporting with interactive Power BI dashboards and automated scheduling workflows. These improvements reduced data processing time by 40% and directly contributed to a 300% increase in customer acquisition, showcasing my ability to translate complex data into actionable business strategies. Ultimately, I know that the Human Resources Data Analyst role at The Plastic Surgery Center would allow me to bring my data storytelling skills to your HR reporting packages. Additionally, my experience at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data integrity and cross-functional collaboration skills. While working on insurance testing data, I collaborated with Underwriting and Product teams to clean and reconcile complex datasets, improving overall data accuracy by 30%. This project underscored the importance of maintaining rigorous standards when handling sensitive, high-stakes information—a practice I am prepared to bring to your HRIS management and data audit initiatives. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my advanced Excel and SQL skills in working on headcount, turnover, and engagement reporting at The Plastic Surgery Center. I know that my technical proficiency and analytical mindset align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss how my background in building reliable, automated data systems can support your HR objectives. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
